name: Rooh-e-khaas
description:
Rooh-e-Khaas

A fragrance crafted for those who carry elegance in silence and power in presence. Rooh-e-Khaas is a luxurious blend of rich oriental notes, warm woods, and soft florals that leave a lasting impression from the very first spray. Deep, mysterious, and irresistibly refined, this scent captures the essence of royalty and timeless sophistication.

Designed for both special occasions and everyday luxury, Rooh-e-Khaas wraps you in an aura of confidence, class, and unforgettable charm. Every note unfolds like a story — bold at heart, smooth in character, and addictive in its trail.

A scent not just worn… but remembered.

name: For Him
description:
For Him

Bold, refined, and undeniably masculine — For Him is a statement of confidence and sophistication. Opening with fresh citrus notes that instantly energize the senses, the fragrance evolves into a rich heart of warm woods, rose, and sensual musk, creating a smooth yet powerful character.

As it settles, deep oud, amber, and vanilla leave behind a luxurious trail that feels intense, elegant, and unforgettable. Crafted for the modern man who values style, strength, and presence, this fragrance is perfect for evenings, special occasions, and everyday moments that deserve distinction.

For Him — where luxury meets masculinity.
